prompt_text: A handheld camera follows a parkour runner leaping across rainy rooftops at dusk with reflections and splashes.
A drone chases a speedboat weaving through narrow canyons with foam trails and dynamic water spray.
A snowboarder carves down a steep powder slope while wind throws snow particles across the lens.
A horse gallops through shallow surf at sunrise with cinematic backlight and crashing waves.
A cyclist sprints through a neon-lit city intersection with passing traffic and motion blur.
A fighter jet performs a low-altitude canyon roll with heat haze and fast parallax terrain.
A robot dog runs through a factory floor dodging moving cranes and sparks from welding arms.
A basketball player performs a fast break and slam dunk in a crowded arena with camera whip pans.
